titleStmt.title: SII 22.157: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 157. (A.R. No. 157 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJ. (?) KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA (III)—5th YEAR (A.D. 1182-83).

summary.p: The inscription begins with the introduction Puyalvāyttu vaḷamperuga etc. This registers the gift of certain taxes like kīḻiṟai, antarāyam, taṟiyiṟai, taṭṭārpāṭṭam etc., due from the Śeṭṭis, Vāṇiyar and wage earners to the chief Arasanārāyaṇaṉ Ēḻiśaimōgan alias Jananātha-Kachchiyarāyaṉ of Kūḍalūr, to the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍaruḷiya-Nāyanār at Iṟaiyānaraiyūr to meet the expenses of the unguents required for the daily anointment of the deity and of the tiruviśūḻ-śāttugai (?) once every year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . puyalvāyttu vaḷamperukap poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyal vāyppat tirumakaḷum jayamakaḷum viṟṟiruppa veṇmatipol kuṭai viḷaṅka velventa raṭipaṇiyac cakkara
muñ ceṅkolun tikkaṉaittuṅ kāvalpūṇa kaṟpakālam puvikāppa poṟ pamainta muṭipuṇarntu cempoṉ virasiṅhamsanattu Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻānaṭika ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya ko
rājakeśaripatmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu karkaṭakanāyaṟṟu malāṭāṉa jananāthavaḷanāṭṭup pāṉūṟkūṟṟattu brahmadeya miṟaiyānaraiyūrāṉa śrī
coḻakeraḷac caruppetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyā rūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷiya(ṉa) nāyanārkku kūṭalūr Aracanārāyaṇaṉa Eḻicaimokaṉāna janaṉāta kacciyarāyaneṉ Iṉṉāyanārkku Āṇṭutoṟum tiruvvi
cūḻ cāttukaikkum nittappaṭi tirumelpūccuc cāttukaikkum nāṉ viṭṭa vibhavamāvatu Ivvūr kuṭi Irukkum ceṭṭikaḷum vāṇiyarum paṇicey makkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭāriṟukkum kiḻiṟai Anta
rāyam taṟiyiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭam Epperpaṭṭaṉavum Iṉnāyanār śrīpaṇ ṭārattukku Āṇṭutoṟum Iṉanāyaṉār śrīkāriyañceyvār taṇṭi śrīpaṇṭārattile Oṭukki Idharmam candrā
dittyavaṟ cellakkaṭavatāka kalveṭṭi viṭṭeṉ kūṭalūr Aracanārāyaṇaṉ Eḻicaimokanāna jaṉaṉātak kacciyarāyaneṉ Itdharmattukku Aḻivuceyvāṉ valla varaiyaṉ satya
m gaṅkaiyiṭai kumariyiṭai ceytār ceyta pāvaṅkoḷvār candrādityavaṟ ci panmāheśvara rakṣai ḥ
Digital edition of SII 22.157 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
